note: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). Every ⚑ below is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number. Privaty (Water AR Attacker, Burst III, treasure; ammo 60, reloadFrames 81, chargeFrames 0 = autofire AR, hitsPerShot 1). S1 = fullBurstEnter team buff on ALL allies (ATK ▲23.61% / Reload Speed ▲51.16% / Max Ammo ▼50.66% / Attack Damage ▲20.16%, 10s). The reload-speed + max-ammo lines GATE SHOT COUNT (HARD RULE 1) and are modeled, not skipped; max-ammo ▼ = negative maxAmmoPct. S2 = two lastBullet riders: a generic one (Damage Taken ▲10.01% boss debuff + 256.17% additional damage, fires every reload) and a 1687% additional-damage rider gated on the burst's 'Designated Target' status (requiresTargetStatus). Burst = self Elemental Advantage Attack Damage ▲130% (prior 7: exceeds the clean ×1.10, must be modeled), a 1407.64% Burst Skill nuke, and applies the 'Designated Target' targetStatus (10s) that opens the S2 1687% gate; the line's ATK ▼5.02% is kept as an inert boss debuff (boss ATK does not feed player DPS in v1). The 3s stun is SKIPPED (control on an immortal partless boss that deals no damage = zero DPS impact). Function-damage riders authored crit:true / no-core / noFb-omitted (FB-by-timing ON) per prior-2 text-fidelity; the burst nuke has no crit set (ein burst-nuke style). leakDetected: null.
caveats: skill2: the 256.17% generic last-bullet rider and the 1687% Designated-Target rider are modeled as INDEPENDENT blocks (both fire on a last-bullet hit while the status is up). The kit gives two separate ■ triggers but never states mutual exclusivity — ⚑ verify whether they co-fire or are exclusive during the status window.

burst: 'Designated Target: ATK ▼ 5.02%' is modeled as targetStatus('Designated Target', 10s) — the load-bearing part that opens the S2 1687% requiresTargetStatus gate — plus an inert atkPct -5.02 boss debuff (boss ATK does not feed player DPS in v1; kept so the stat line is not silently dropped).
burst: 3s stun SKIPPED to unmodeled — control on an immortal partless boss that deals no damage; zero DPS impact.

skill2 riders: crit:true / no core / noFb omitted (FB-by-timing ON) per prior-2 text-fidelity for function-type additional-damage riders; the 1407.64% burst nuke has NO crit set (ein burst-nuke style, schema crit is opt-in) — ⚑ both choices.
burst: elemAdvantageDamagePct ▲130% is live ONLY when Privaty has elemental advantage vs the boss (prior 7); inert on a neutral/non-advantaged scope-lock boss, so it moves only advantaged comps.
